reason: VP/SVP suffices, not the CEO: the pack's own highest-leverage move scopes the executive connect to the deal owner's MANAGER reaching Bosch's economic buyer Simon Vogelmann (a procurement economic buyer, NOT a CEO/board peer), brokered through champion Thomas Kirmse; John Woodcock (VP/SVP Sales) is already engaged and explicitly the one who suggested engaging Bosch's C-level post-testing. Remaining blockers are presales/product execution (overdue BYOK/SCIM written commitment, Swagger/Postman API docs, RFP2 scorecard response) and competitive-intel extraction from Kirmse. No CEO-to-CEO relationship is the lever and no commitment beyond delegated authority is required.
